# openai_invite (Resource)

Manage an organization invite.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_invite" "example" {
  email = "example_email"
  role  = "owner"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) email
- `role` (String) role

### Read-Only

- `accepted_at` (Number) accepted at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `invite_id` (String) invite id
- `status` (String) status
